title: Conimbricenses
body: The Conimbricenses are an important collection of Jesuit commentaries on Aristotle compiled at University of Coimbra in Coimbra, Portugal.
categories: Articles incorporating a citation from the 1913 Catholic Encyclopedia with Wikisource reference
